creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
Date: Tue, 27 Nov 2001 01:08:18 -0500
From: Mike Barcroft <mike@FreeBSD.ORG>
To: www@FreeBSD.ORG
Subject: Re: Adding a Link to BSDMall.com

  
Mike Barcroft <mike@FreeBSD.org> writes:
> Is there a specific reason we don't have an icon and link to
> BSDMall.com on the main FreeBSD.org site?  I think it would be a good
> opportunity for us to show our support for them.

It doesn't look like anyone has any objections.  Is someone from the
web team interested in coordinating this?
  
Best regards,
Mike Barcroft
